title: Salisbury Teacher Arrested on Sex Offense Charges
summary: David Steelman, 51, faces multiple sex offense charges involving a former student, dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of safeguarding students and the long-term consequences of abuse of power.

title: Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Against Builder
summary: A Denver couple won a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation related to construction issues.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the risks associated with construction projects and the importance of due diligence.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Expansion
summary: The FAA awarded Charlotte Douglas $46.9M to expand the airport apron, part of a larger nationwide investment in airport infrastructure.
charlotte_impact: Supports economic growth and improves travel efficiency by modernizing aviation infrastructure.

title: Cooler, Drier Weather Forecast for Friday
summary: A significant cooldown is expected for the upcoming weekend.
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief weather update relevant to local residents.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run in Charlotte
summary: Frank Leon Dent died months after a hit-and-run on West Sugar Creek Road. Police are seeking information on the driver.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the tragic consequences of hit-and-run incidents and the need for justice.

title: Suspect Arrested in Hit-and-Run of 8-Year-Old
summary: Shaiquailalia Di Ndia Lashi Harris was charged with felony hit-and-run after an 8-year-old was struck by a car in south Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers to pedestrians and the importance of holding reckless drivers accountable.

title: Charlotte Transit System Reports 69% Drop in Crime
summary: Charlotte's transit system reports a 69% decrease in crime on buses and light rail following security initiatives.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the effectiveness of security measures in improving public safety on transit systems.

title: Liquor Purchases Fund Community Projects in Mecklenburg
summary: Mecklenburg County liquor purchases fund community projects, with increased funding for law enforcement and alcohol education.
charlotte_impact: Shows how revenue from alcohol sales can be reinvested in community safety and education.

title: 16-Year-Old Drowns in Lake Wylie
summary: A 16-year-old drowned in Lake Wylie after failing to resurface while boating on Thursday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of water safety and the potential dangers of recreational activities.

title: Woman Killed in Single-Vehicle Crash in Rock Hill
summary: A 50-year-old woman died in a single-vehicle crash on Red River Road after her vehicle hit a fence and overturned.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risks of driving and the importance of road safety.

title: Charlotte Athlete Breaks Coach's 41-Year-Old Record
summary: ZaNovia Davis breaks Garinger High's 41-year-old 400m record, previously held by her coach, Tanya Filmore-Scott.
charlotte_impact: Celebrates athletic achievement and the passing of a legacy from coach to student.

title: Multiple Arrests in North Charlotte Drug and Firearms Case
summary: Federal and local operations lead to multiple arrests in a north Charlotte case involving drug trafficking and firearms charges.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the ongoing issue of drug-related crime and its impact on the community.

title: Sonic Boom Rattles South Carolina Roofs; Cause Unknown
summary: The USGS identified a roof-rattling rumble in South Carolina as a sonic boom, but the cause remains undetermined.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates unusual natural phenomena and the challenges of identifying their origins.

title: Nonprofit Empowers Teens to Choose a Different Path
summary: Step Up to Leadership prepares for a youth-led event focused on violence prevention, mental health, and positive decision-making.
charlotte_impact: Supports youth development and provides resources for making positive life choices.

title: Charlotte Man Charged in 2024 Home Invasion
summary: Aaron Deunte Ratliff faces felony charges in a 2024 Wadesboro home invasion after DNA evidence linked him to the crime.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the effectiveness of forensic evidence in solving violent crimes.
